title: metastelma suberosum
intro: Metastelma suberosum, also known as velvet-stemmed Metastelma or velvet-stemmed orange-creeper, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Metastelma suberosum include treating fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from pain and reducing inflammation. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for its medicinal uses, and it is also used in traditional herbal preparations to support overall health and well-being.
